nodes.name: baoyu-image-gen
nodes.description: AI image generation with OpenAI, Google and DashScope APIs. Supports text-to-image, reference images, aspect ratios. Sequential by default; parallel generation available on request. Use when user asks

nodes.name: deep-research
nodes.description: Conducts enterprise-grade research with multi-source synthesis, citation tracking, and verification. Produces citation-backed reports through a structured pipeline with source credibility scoring. Tri

nodes.name: ideal-code-review
nodes.description: Use for two-stage code review after batch execution. Reviews spec compliance first, then code quality. Called by ideal-dev-exec automatically.

nodes.name: ideal-debugging
nodes.description: Use when encountering bugs, test failures, or unexpected behavior. Implements systematic debugging with root cause analysis before any fixes.

nodes.name: deep-research
nodes.description: Conducts enterprise-grade research with multi-source synthesis, citation tracking, and verification. Produces citation-backed reports through a structured pipeline with source credibility scoring. Tri

nodes.name: ideal-delivery
nodes.description: Use when P14 wiki review is completed and the iteration needs to be finalized. Triggers on: 成果提交, 标记完成, 归档, 交付, delivery, submit, PR创建, 合并代码.

nodes.name: ideal-dev-exec
nodes.description: Use when P8 test case review is completed and development execution is needed. Executes coding tasks following TDD principles with Git branch management.

nodes.name: ideal-dev-plan
nodes.description: Use when P4 solution review is completed and coding plan generation is needed. Breaks down technical solution into atomic tasks with TDD organization.

nodes.name: ideal-dev-solution
nodes.description: Use when P2 requirement review is completed and technical solution generation is needed. Analyzes requirements and generates comprehensive technical design including architecture, tech stack, data mod

nodes.name: ideal-flow-control
nodes.description: Use when managing workflow phase transitions and state control. Triggers on: 流程状态、阶段推进、下一阶段、YOLO模式、自动迭代、工作流编排、flow state、phase control. This is the orchestration protocol — it defines how the main age

nodes.name: ideal-init
nodes.description: Use when initializing a new project to CC-Workflow, migrating an existing project, or user mentions "初始化项目", "接入工作流", "/ideal-init". Performs AI-powered project detection and configuration generation.

nodes.name: ideal-requirement
nodes.description: Use when: (1) starting a new feature, bug fix, or refactoring task, (2) user mentions '需求', '需求文档', 'PRD', 'requirement', '需求编写', '需求收集', 'bug修复', '重构需求'.

nodes.name: ideal-test-case
nodes.description: Use when P6 plan review is completed and test case generation is needed. Extracts acceptance criteria and generates functional, boundary, and exception test cases.

nodes.name: ideal-test-exec
nodes.description: Use when P10 code review is completed and test execution is needed. Executes test cases and generates test reports with defect tracking.

nodes.name: ideal-wiki
nodes.description: Use when P12 test review is completed and wiki documentation generation is needed. Creates high-quality wiki documentation based on project context.

nodes.name: ideal-dify-generator
nodes.description: 完整的 Dify 智能体/工作流 DSL 生成器。从自然语言需求出发，生成可直接导入 Dify 的完整 DSL YAML 文件。支持端到端流程：需求分析 → 节点选型 → DSL 生成 → 自动校验 → 输出交付。融合 dify-dsl-generator 的案例驱动方法与 dify-workflow-skills 的精细化工程规范。

nodes.name: document-render
nodes.description:
文档渲染输出阶段。将 Markdown 中间件渲染为指定格式的最终交付物。
触发场景：(1) workflow 调用本 skill (2) 用户要求"生成 Word"、"生成 PPT"、"导出文档"
产出：最终交付物（markdown/docx/pptx）

nodes.name: document-writing
nodes.description:
结构化文档 P7 并行写作阶段。当需要根据大纲和任务拆分执行并行写作时使用。
触发场景：(1) workflow 调用本 skill (2) 用户要求"写章节"、"开始写作"
核心功能：基于写作任务卡执行内容写作，使用 What-Why-How 模式确保内容完整。

nodes.name: ideal-document-workflow
nodes.description:
结构化文档写作编排工作流。当用户需要撰写结构化长文档（技术方案、知识库文档、汇报材料等）时使用。
核心功能：协调各阶段 skill 完成需求分析→大纲生成→任务拆分→并行写作→配图→渲染输出。
各阶段之间设有审核关卡，需要人工确认后方可进入下一阶段。
本 skill 为编排器，负责阶段流转和状态管理，各阶段实现详见独立 skills。

nodes.name: illustration
nodes.description:
结构化文档 P5 智能配图阶段。识别文档中的配图位置，判断图片类型，选择合适的工具生成并插入图片。
触发场景：(1) workflow 调用本 skill (2) 用户要求"配图"、"智能配图"、"生成图片"
核心功能：分析章节内容 → 判断配图类型 → 选择生成工具 → 生成并插入图片。
图片生成工具：Mermaid 官方 CLI（流程图/时序图）、`baoyu-image-gen`（架构图/路

nodes.name: outline-generation
nodes.description:
结构化文档 P3 大纲生成阶段。当需要生成文档大纲（1-3级标题+篇幅估算）时使用。
触发场景：(1) workflow 调用本 skill (2) 用户要求"生成大纲"、"文档大纲"
产出：P2-大纲.md

nodes.name: requirement-analysis
nodes.description:
结构化文档 P1 需求分析阶段。当需要解析功能需求、非功能需求、技术约束时使用。
触发场景：(1) workflow 调用本 skill (2) 用户要求"需求分析"、"解析需求"
产出：P1-需求分析.md

nodes.name: task-split
nodes.description:
结构化文档 P3 任务拆分阶段。当需要将大纲拆分为可并行执行的写作任务时使用。
触发场景：(1) workflow 调用本 skill (2) 用户要求"拆分任务"、"任务分配"
产出：P3-任务拆分.md

nodes.name: writing-skills
nodes.description: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment

nodes.name: ideal-graph-orchestrator
nodes.description: 通用 Skill Graph 编排器。双模式：(1) Generate — 自然语言描述需求，自动匹配 skills-graph.json 中的已有 skill、检测缺口、编译 workflow.yml；(2) Execute — 读取 workflow.yml，沿图路径顺序执行，处理已有 skill 复用和新建 skill scaffold。Use when user wants to comp

nodes.name: build-knowledge-base-workflow
nodes.description:
知识库构建编排工作流。当用户需要从项目原始素材中构建结构化知识库时使用。
触发场景：(1) 用户要求"构建知识库"、"分析项目" (2) 用户提供了项目路径希望生成知识库

nodes.name: kb-deep-analysis
nodes.description:
知识库构建 P2 深度分析阶段。从原始材料中深度提取项目知识，建立完整的认知模型。
触发场景：(1) workflow 调用本 skill (2) 用户要求"深度分析"、"分析项目"
产出：P2-分析报告.md

nodes.name: kb-doc-planning
nodes.description:
知识库构建 P3 文档规划阶段。根据分析结果规划知识库文档结构，确定文档清单和各文档内容要点。
触发场景：(1) workflow 调用本 skill (2) 用户要求"文档规划"、"规划知识库"
产出：P3-文档规划.md

nodes.name: kb-doc-writing
nodes.description:
知识库构建 P4 文档生成阶段。根据文档规划，并行生成知识库文档。
触发场景：(1) workflow 调用本 skill (2) 用户要求"生成知识库文档"、"生成文档"
产出：知识库/项目名称/*.md

nodes.name: kb-index-review
nodes.description: P5（索引更新与质量审查）阶段技能 - 更新分类索引和主索引，执行知识库质量审查，确保文档完整性和标准化

nodes.name: kb-material-scope
nodes.description:
知识库构建 P1 材料收集与范围确认阶段。扫描项目原始素材，评估材料覆盖度，识别知识缺口，确认项目分类。
触发场景：(1) workflow 调用本 skill (2) 用户要求"扫描材料"、"材料收集"
产出：P1-材料清单.md

nodes.name: ideal-lab-maintainer
nodes.description: ideal-lab monorepo 维护工具。用于：提交改动并自动生成 changeset（/maintainer commit）、新增 skill（/maintainer add-skill）、新增 plugin（/maintainer add-plugin）、发布版本（/maintainer release）、全量校验（/maintainer validate）、更新 README（/mai

nodes.name: ideal-ppt-executor
nodes.description: Use when P8 or P10 review is completed and HTML execution phase begins. Generates standalone HTML slides with embedded SVG graphics and AI images. Triggered by ideal-ppt-workflow at P11.

nodes.name: ideal-ppt-export
nodes.description: Use when P12 review is completed and export/delivery phase begins. Dual-pipeline export — HTML mode (Playwright → editable native PPTX) and Image mode (PNG → pixel-perfect image-based PPTX). Also expo

nodes.name: ideal-ppt-image
nodes.description: Use when P8 prompt review is completed AND design-spec image_approach is "ai-generated". Generates AI images for slide assets. Triggered by ideal-ppt-workflow at P9 (conditional).

nodes.name: ideal-ppt-image-executor
nodes.description: Use when P8 or P10 review is completed AND rendering_mode=image in flow state. Generates slide images via gpt-image-2-compatible AI image generation. Triggered by ideal-ppt-workflow at P11.

nodes.name: ideal-ppt-outline
nodes.description: Use when P3 strategy review is completed and content outline generation phase begins. Triggered by ideal-ppt-workflow at P5.

nodes.name: ideal-ppt-prompt
nodes.description: Use when P5 outline review is completed and prompt engineering phase begins. Supports dual rendering modes — html (CSS layout prompts) and image (content-rich image generation prompts). Triggered by i

nodes.name: ideal-ppt-requirement
nodes.description: Use when starting a new PPT project. Performs requirements gathering through Socratic questioning and content analysis. Triggered by ideal-ppt-workflow at P1.

nodes.name: ideal-ppt-speaker-notes
nodes.description: Use when P11 (slide execution) is completed and speaker notes generation begins. Mode-independent — generates notes from outline/prompts/strategy regardless of rendering_mode. Triggered by ideal-ppt-w

nodes.name: ideal-ppt-strategist
nodes.description: Use when P1 research review is completed and strategy/design specification phase needs to begin. Triggered by ideal-ppt-workflow at P3.

nodes.name: ideal-ppt-workflow
nodes.description: Use when user asks to "create slides", "make a presentation", "generate deck", "PPT", "幻灯片", "生成PPT", "制作PPT", "制作演示文稿"

nodes.name: image-to-svg
nodes.description: 将 AI 生成的图片（PNG/JPG/WebP）转换为结构化、ppt-master 兼容的可编辑 SVG 文件。 通过 Claude Vision 分区精读图片内容（布局、文字、形状、颜色），逐字抄录后生成 原生矢量 SVG（每个元素可独立编辑）。输出可直接送入 ppt-master 的 svg_to_pptx 管线导出 PPTX。 Convert AI-generated images into

nodes.name: ideal-ralph
nodes.description: 苏格拉底式任务澄清 + 持久小步迭代验证循环。适用于需要保证完成质量的独立任务。

nodes.name: panel-review
nodes.description: 多维会审：自动分析上文产出，动态组建专家团队从多视角对抗性审查文档/代码/方案/PPT，输出按严重度排序的攻击面报告。支持 yolo_mode 自动模式供 workflow 编排器零交互调用。Use when user says "审查", "会审", "挑刺", "review", "audit", "找问题", "看看有什么漏洞", "帮我审一下", "把把关", "红队", "有没有坑".

nodes.name: skill-builder
nodes.description: Skill 全生命周期引擎。从用户需求创建新 skill，持续优化已有 SKILL.md，或从外部 skill 吸收设计精华改进目标 skill。双重评估：结构评分（7 维度，75 分）+ checklist 实测（25 分）。爬山优化 + 对抗审稿 + same-judge 判卷 + 棘轮机制。Use when user mentions "优化skill", "创建skill", "新建ski
